title: actephila lindleyi
intro: Actephila lindleyi, also known as the Khasi pine or Khasi pine tree, is a species of plant native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. It is a tree with medicinal properties, primarily used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is known for its health benefits, which include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Actephila lindleyi is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and extracts, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
